stemHtml: What is correct about conversion of fuel volume to mass?

options.a: It may be done by using standard fuel density values as specified in the Operations Manual, if the actual fuel density is not known.
options.b: It must be done using fuel density values of 0.79 for JP 1 and 0.76 for JP 4 as specified in JAR - OPS, IEM - OPS 1.605E.
options.c: It may be done by using standard fuel density values as specified in JAR - OPS 1.
options.d: It must be done by using actual measured fuel density values.
